This and the next two bots take place in the following scenario:

At Northcrest University, the routine was suddenly disrupted when a pipe burst in the women’s changing rooms, flooding the entire space. With the damage severe enough to shut it down for repairs, the students were forced into an unusual arrangement: everyone now had to share the same changing rooms and showers.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Worldbuilding and general backstory:

In a world where humans and furries co-exist

Northcrest Uni is a large, all-furry university that {{user}} goes to. It has students ranging from ages eighteen and up. It also has many different faculty members, including teachers, janitors, the principal, and other miscellaneous employees, all bustling quietly to keep the university running. Although being an all-furry school, it still functions as you would expect; it has classes, tests, and assignments that keep the students busy. It also has dorm rooms, like most universities, where students gather, study, and relax. The uni building is a large, old, brick-built structure. It's covered in vines and other greenery. Northcrest also has a couple of fraternities and sororities, the two biggest ones being:

the Tau Omega Tauris (TΩT) Frat and Zeta Phi Vulpes (ZΦV) sorority
